'''鈭歸-r-th''' ('''kawarath''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:ubiquitylate|ubiquitylate]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| w-r-th
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:ubiquitylate|ubiquitylate]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歸-r-th
|-
! Lemma
| kawarath
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thiwarath|thiwarath]] || [[word:jiwarath|jiwarath]] || [[word:shiwarath|shiwarath]] || [[word:kiwarath|kiwarath]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthuwarath|thuthuwarath]] || [[word:jujuwarath|jujuwarath]] || [[word:shushuwarath|shushuwarath]] || [[word:kukuwarath|kukuwarath]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thuwarath|thuwarath]] || [[word:juwarath|juwarath]] || [[word:shuwarath|shuwarath]] || [[word:kuwarath|kuwarath]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thuwarath|thuwarath]] || [[word:juwarath|juwarath]] || [[word:shuwarath|shuwarath]] || [[word:kuwarath|kuwarath]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thewarath|thewarath]] || [[word:jewarath|jewarath]] || [[word:shewarath|shewarath]] || [[word:kewarath|kewarath]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothowarath|thothowarath]] || [[word:jojowarath|jojowarath]] || [[word:shoshowarath|shoshowarath]] || [[word:kokowarath|kokowarath]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thowarath|thowarath]] || [[word:jowarath|jowarath]] || [[word:showarath|showarath]] || [[word:kowarath|kowarath]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thowarath|thowarath]] || [[word:jowarath|jowarath]] || [[word:showarath|showarath]] || [[word:kowarath|kowarath]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:th忙warath|th忙warath]] || [[word:j忙warath|j忙warath]] || [[word:sh忙warath|sh忙warath]] || [[word:k忙warath|k忙warath]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathawarath|thathawarath]] || [[word:jajawarath|jajawarath]] || [[word:shashawarath|shashawarath]] || [[word:kakawarath|kakawarath]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thawarath|thawarath]] || [[word:jawarath|jawarath]] || [[word:shawarath|shawarath]] || [[word:kawarath|kawarath]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thawarath|thawarath]] || [[word:jawarath|jawarath]] || [[word:shawarath|shawarath]] || [[word:kawarath|kawarath]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shawarath|shawarath]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshawarath|goshawarath]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishawarath|gokishawarath]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shawarathn眉|shawarathn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshawarathnkn眉|goshawarathnkn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishawarathn眉|gokishawarathn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shawarathsh毛|shawarathsh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshawarathnksh毛|goshawarathnksh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishawarathsh毛|gokishawarathsh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shawarathro|shawarathro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshawarathnkro|goshawarathnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishawarathro|gokishawarathro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shawarathmu|shawarathmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshawarathnkmu|goshawarathnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishawarathmu|gokishawarathmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shawarathsher|shawarathsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshawarathnksher|goshawarathnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishawarathsher|gokishawarathsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shawarathng|shawarathng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshawarathnkng|goshawarathnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishawarathng|gokishawarathng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shawarathya|shawarathya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshawarathnkya|goshawarathnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishawarathya|gokishawarathya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shawarathyam|shawarathyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshawarathnkyam|goshawarathnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishawarathyam|gokishawarathyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shawarathn眉sh毛|shawarathn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshawarathnkn眉sh毛|goshawarathnkn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishawarathn眉sh毛|gokishawarathn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shawarathn眉ro|shawarathn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshawarathnkn眉ro|goshawarathnkn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishawarathn眉ro|gokishawarathn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shawarathn眉mu|shawarathn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshawarathnkn眉mu|goshawarathnkn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishawarathn眉mu|gokishawarathn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shawarathsh毛n眉|shawarathsh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshawarathnksh毛n眉|goshawarathnksh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishawarathsh毛n眉|gokishawarathsh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shawarathsh毛ro|shawarathsh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshawarathnksh毛ro|goshawarathnksh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishawarathsh毛ro|gokishawarathsh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shawarathsh毛mu|shawarathsh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshawarathnksh毛mu|goshawarathnksh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishawarathsh毛mu|gokishawarathsh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shawarathron眉|shawarathron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshawarathnkron眉|goshawarathnkron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishawarathron眉|gokishawarathron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shawarathrosh毛|shawarathrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshawarathnkrosh毛|goshawarathnkrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishawarathrosh毛|gokishawarathrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shawarathromu|shawarathromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshawarathnkromu|goshawarathnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishawarathromu|gokishawarathromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shawarathmun眉|shawarathmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshawarathnkmun眉|goshawarathnkmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishawarathmun眉|gokishawarathmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shawarathmush毛|shawarathmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshawarathnkmush毛|goshawarathnkmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishawarathmush毛|gokishawarathmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shawarathmuro|shawarathmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshawarathnkmuro|goshawarathnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishawarathmuro|gokishawarathmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

{{wordpage|dcef9d8}}
